label: Home PV Control
info: Standalone Home PV Control for Home Battery Control users. Controls configured PV limit entities and can optionally select the HBC strategy.

name: Home PV Control logic
Build entity dropdown options - safe v2
Trigger design
info: PV cooldown is flow-owned and strict: every PV write starts cooldown; no PV write is allowed while active; the first evaluation after cooldown only logs finished, and the next evaluation may change PV again.
